'use client' import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import Link from 'next/link' import { Menu, X, Phone, Sun, Moon } from "lucide-react"; const links = [ { href: '/', label: 'Home' }, { href: '/about', label: 'About' }, { href: '/services', label: 'Services' }, { href: '/conditions', label: 'Conditions' }, { href: '/process', label: 'How It Works' }, { href: '/testimonials', label: 'Results' }, { href: '/faq', label: 'FAQ' }, { href: '/resources', label: 'Resources' }, { href: '/contact', label: 'Book' }, ] export default function Navbar() { const [open, setOpen] = useState(false) const [theme, setTheme] = useState('dark') useEffect(() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'light' setTheme(saved) document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', saved === 'dark') }, []) const toggleTheme = () => { const next = theme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark' setTheme(next) localStorage.setItem('theme', next) document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', next === 'dark') } return (
AlignWell Chiropractic
{links.map((link) => ( {link.label} ))}
(555) 123-4567 Book Now
{open && (
{links.map((link) => ( setOpen(false)}> {link.label} ))} setOpen(false)}> Book Your Appointment
)}
) }

'use client' import Link from 'next/link' import { ArrowRight, Phone, Shield, Award, Heart } from "lucide-react"; export default function Hero() { return (
Gentle care â€¢ Evidence-informed treatment â€¢ Local clinic

Chiropractic care for modern life

Relieve pain, restore movement, and feel stronger with a care plan built around you.

From back pain and sciatica to posture-related tension and recovery support, AlignWell helps local adults and families move with more confidence through thoughtful chiropractic treatment.

Book Your Appointment Learn How We Help
(555) 123-4567 Same-week appointments available

Trusted local care

Personalized treatment plans focused on comfort, clarity, and results.

Whole-person wellness

Hands-on care plus rehab guidance to support recovery beyond the visit.

) }

'use client' import Link from 'next/link' import { Activity, Heart, Shield, Users, ArrowRight, Settings } from "lucide-react"; const items = [ { icon: Activity, title: 'Spinal Adjustments', copy: 'Precise chiropractic adjustments to reduce stiffness, improve joint motion, and support natural healing.' }, { icon: Heart, title: 'Soft Tissue Therapy', copy: 'Hands-on muscle and fascia work to ease tension, improve circulation, and reduce soreness.' }, { icon: Settings, title: 'Rehab Exercises', copy: 'Simple, guided movement plans to reinforce treatment gains and improve long-term stability.' }, { icon: Users, title: 'Family & Pediatric Care', copy: 'Gentle care plans tailored for adults, busy parents, and growing children with changing movement needs.' }, { icon: Shield, title: 'Posture & Workplace Relief', copy: 'Support for desk-related strain, repetitive stress, and commuter aches that build over time.' }, { icon: Activity, title: 'Sports & Injury Recovery', copy: 'Recovery-focused treatment for sprains, overuse patterns, and return-to-activity confidence.' }, ] export default function ServicesPreview() { return (

Pain-relief services

Care options designed to reduce pain and help you move more comfortably.

Every treatment plan begins with understanding your goals, symptoms, and daily demands so care feels personal, practical, and effective.

{items.map((item) => { const Icon = item.icon return (

{item.title}

{item.copy}

) })}
Explore Treatment Programs
) }

'use client' import Link from 'next/link' const conditions = [ { title: 'Back Pain', copy: 'Support for acute flare-ups, chronic low back pain, and movement-related discomfort.' }, { title: 'Neck Pain', copy: 'Relief strategies for stiffness, tech-neck tension, and restricted turning or driving comfort.' }, { title: 'Sciatica', copy: 'Care focused on reducing nerve irritation, improving mobility, and easing leg symptoms.' }, { title: 'Headaches', copy: 'Tension and cervicogenic headache support with gentle manual care and posture guidance.' }, ] export default function ConditionsPreview() { return (

Conditions treated

Common concerns we help manage every week in clinic.

If pain is interfering with work, sleep, exercise, or family time, our goal is to help you understand the cause and take the next step with confidence.

{conditions.map((item) => (

{item.title}

{item.copy}

Book an evaluation
))}
) }

'use client' const steps = [ { number: '01', title: 'Assessment', copy: 'We review symptoms, health history, movement limitations, and daily activity demands to understand the full picture.' }, { number: '02', title: 'Personalized Plan', copy: 'You receive a clear explanation of findings and a treatment approach matched to your goals, comfort, and schedule.' }, { number: '03', title: 'Treatment', copy: 'Hands-on chiropractic care, soft tissue work, and supportive therapies are delivered with patient comfort in mind.' }, { number: '04', title: 'Ongoing Care', copy: 'We monitor progress, refine your plan, and provide home strategies to maintain results between visits.' }, ] export default function ProcessSection() { return (

Treatment journey

A calm, step-by-step process that keeps you informed from day one.

Whether you are visiting for recent pain or ongoing maintenance, we focus on clear communication, practical next steps, and measurable progress.

{steps.map((step) => (
{step.number}

{step.title}

{step.copy}

))}
) }

Patient stories

Real feedback from patients who wanted relief they could feel in daily life.

We focus on outcomes that matter: easier mornings, better focus at work, fewer flare-ups, and more confidence getting back to what you enjoy.

{reviews.map((review, index) => (
{[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

))}
) }

'use client' import Link from 'next/link' import { Award, Download } from "lucide-react"; export default function PractitionerPreview() { return (

Meet your practitioner

Thoughtful, patient-centered care led by Dr. Maya Thompson, DC.

Dr. Thompson combines manual chiropractic care, soft tissue strategies, and practical rehab education to help patients feel heard, supported, and steadily improving. Her focus is simple: explain what is happening, treat with care, and help you feel confident about your next step.

  • Doctor of Chiropractic with 14+ years of clinical experience
  • Special interest in back pain, headaches, posture stress, and family wellness care
  • Continuing education in rehabilitation, movement assessment, and gentle technique approaches
Meet Our Team Download Credentials
Licensed chiropractor â€¢ Community-trusted provider
) }

'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { Calendar, Clock, Send } from "lucide-react"; export default function BookingSection() { const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', phone: '', email: '', preferredDate: '', preferredTime: '', reason: '' }) const [status, setStatus] = useState(null) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false) const handleChange = (e) => { setForm({ ...form, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }) } const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault() setLoading(true) const res = await fetch('/api/appointment', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(form), }) const data = await res.json() setStatus(data) setLoading(false) if (data.success) { setForm({ name: '', phone: '', email: '', preferredDate: '', preferredTime: '', reason: '' }) } } return (

Request an appointment

Tell us what is going on, and we will help you schedule the right visit.

Use this quick request form for booking inquiries. For urgent concerns, please call the clinic directly. Integration with your preferred scheduler can be added later.

Online booking ready

Built to support future Calendly, Acuity, or EHR scheduling integrations.

Fast confirmations

Our team aims to confirm requests quickly and guide you on next steps before your first visit.

Book Your Free Consultation Call (555) 123-4567
) }

'use client'

import Navbar from './components/Navbar'
import Hero from './components/Hero'
import TrustBar from './components/TrustBar'
import ServicesPreview from './components/ServicesPreview'
import ConditionsPreview from './components/ConditionsPreview'
import ProcessSection from './components/ProcessSection'
import StatsSection from './components/StatsSection'
import PractitionerPreview from './components/PractitionerPreview'
import TestimonialsPreview from './components/TestimonialsPreview'
import BookingSection from './components/BookingSection'
import FinalCTA from './components/FinalCTA'
import Footer from './components/Footer'

export default function HomePage() {
  return (
    <main className="site-shell">
      <Navbar />
      <Hero />
      <TrustBar />
      <ServicesPreview />
      <ConditionsPreview />
      <ProcessSection />
      <StatsSection />
      <PractitionerPreview />
      <TestimonialsPreview />
      <BookingSection />
      <FinalCTA />
      <Footer />
    </main>
  )
}

'use client' import Navbar from '../components/Navbar' import Footer from '../components/Footer' import PageHero from '../components/PageHero' export default function AboutPage() { return (

Who we are

Care that balances clinical expertise with a calm, personal experience.

We believe patients make better decisions when they feel informed and supported. That is why each visit is built around listening carefully, explaining findings clearly, and creating a plan that fits your daily life.

  • Single-location clinic with local SEO-focused service pages and community-first care
  • Visible practitioner credentials and continuing education background
  • Gentle treatment options for adults, commuters, athletes, and families
  • Supportive communication from booking through follow-up
) }

'use client' import Navbar from '../components/Navbar' import Footer from '../components/Footer' import PageHero from '../components/PageHero' const services = [ { title: 'Spinal Adjustments', copy: 'Hands-on chiropractic adjustments designed to restore motion and reduce discomfort in the spine and joints.' }, { title: 'Soft Tissue Therapy', copy: 'Targeted muscle and connective tissue work to release tension and improve movement quality.' }, { title: 'Corrective Exercise', copy: 'Customized rehab exercises that reinforce treatment benefits and improve stability over time.' }, { title: 'Postural Care', copy: 'Support for desk posture, driving strain, and repetitive movement patterns linked to pain.' }, { title: 'Family Wellness Visits', copy: 'Ongoing care for adults and families seeking better mobility, recovery, and maintenance support.' }, { title: 'Injury Recovery Programs', copy: 'Structured plans for sports injuries, overuse, and work-related strain with measurable goals.' }, ] export default function ServicesPage() { return (
{services.map((service, index) => (

{service.title}

{service.copy}

))}
) }

{items.map((item, index) => (

{item.title}

{item.copy}

))}
) }

'use client'

import Navbar from '../components/Navbar'
import Footer from '../components/Footer'
import PageHero from '../components/PageHero'
import ProcessSection from '../components/ProcessSection'

export default function ProcessPage() {
  return (
    <main className="site-shell">
      <Navbar />
      <PageHero label="How it works" title="A clear treatment path from your first consultation to ongoing care." copy="We remove guesswork by explaining each step, what to expect, and how your plan supports both relief and long-term progress." />
      <ProcessSection />
      <Footer />
    </main>
  )
}

'use client'

import Navbar from '../components/Navbar'
import Footer from '../components/Footer'
import PageHero from '../components/PageHero'
import TestimonialsPreview from '../components/TestimonialsPreview'

export default function TestimonialsPage() {
  return (
    <main className="site-shell">
      <Navbar />
      <PageHero label="Testimonials & results" title="Stories from patients who wanted less pain and more freedom in daily life." copy="From easier workdays to more comfortable sleep and movement, these stories reflect the kinds of progress we aim to create with every plan." />
      <TestimonialsPreview />
      <Footer />
    </main>
  )
}

'use client' import Navbar from '../components/Navbar' import Footer from '../components/Footer' import PageHero from '../components/PageHero' const faqs = [ { q: 'What happens at the first visit?', a: 'Your first visit includes discussion of symptoms, health history, movement assessment, and a recommended care plan based on findings.' }, { q: 'Do you accept insurance?', a: 'Coverage varies by plan. We can provide a clear insurance and pricing snapshot, and many patients also use out-of-network benefits.' }, { q: 'Is chiropractic care safe?', a: 'Safety is a priority. Recommendations are based on your history, presentation, and comfort, with referrals made whenever needed.' }, { q: 'What if I need to cancel?', a: 'We ask for advance notice whenever possible so we can offer the appointment time to another patient.' }, ] export default function FAQPage() { return (
{faqs.map((faq, index) => (

{faq.q}

{faq.a}

))}
) }

{posts.map((post, index) => (

{post.category}

{post.title}

{post.excerpt}

) }

'use client' import Navbar from '../components/Navbar' import Footer from '../components/Footer' import PageHero from '../components/PageHero' export default function PrivacyPage() { return (

Privacy notice

We collect only the information needed to respond to appointment requests and basic inquiries. Patients should avoid sending sensitive health details through general website forms.

Booking and cancellations

Requested appointment times are not guaranteed until confirmed by the clinic. We appreciate advance notice for cancellations or rescheduling whenever possible.

Patient intake forms

Secure intake forms and HIPAA-compliant systems should be provided through your chosen clinical software or secure patient portal.

) }
